title: Educator/learner beneficiary validation of the subject's decks
context: Elyos measures success by outcomes delivered to real beneficiaries, not tasks merged. Educator/learner validation confirms that the published deck set is genuinely useful and accurate from the perspective of real users, not just the authors. Feedback from validation feeds back into the style guide and reviewer checklist to improve future batches.
objective: Obtain validation of the published subject deck set from at least one educator or learner, documenting their accuracy and usability assessment and feeding findings back into project documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 1 educator or learner reviews the published subject deck set and provides a written assessment of accuracy and usability.
Assessment covers: factual accuracy, card clarity, coverage gaps, any errors found, and overall usability for the intended learning purpose.
Findings are documented with the reviewer's role/background (without personal identifying information beyond consent), date, and deck versions reviewed.
Any errors or improvement suggestions identified are triaged and fed back into the style guide or reviewer checklist.
Document notes whether verifiedNeed can now be set to true for future deck tasks targeting this subject and channel.
Published as a versioned document, CC-BY-4.0.
output: A versioned beneficiary-validation report (docs/beneficiary-validation.md) documenting educator/learner feedback, error triage, and implications for verifiedNeed status, CC-BY-4.0.
